sections_cited: Section 31 of the Sindh Public Procurement Rules

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 863 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 24.08.2023 Petitioner Shakeel Ahmed Junejo, present in person. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Kubar, Assistant Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Petitioner, present in person, does not press this petition and submits that he has already filed an application against the tender process before the Complaint Redressal Committee in terms of Section 31 of the Sindh Public Procurement Rules, 2010. The petition is dismissed as not pressed; however, Chairman of aforesaid committee shall decide the pending application of petitioner within stipulated period provided in aforesaid Rules and shall submit compliance report to this Court through learned Additional Advocate General Sindh. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
